description: Execute V0.8 Root README Overhaul: Completely rewrite the root README.md and add a README_zh-CN.md to serve as the ultimate open-source landing page. It must clearly explain the background, theory, paradigms, features, and provide a 1-click Quickstart/Installation guide for both personal and team collaboration scenarios.
scope: 1. Rewrite README.md (English) with deep background (Why this exists), the 'Conceptual Triumvirate' theory, core features, and concrete quickstart CLI commands. 2. Create README_zh-CN.md (Chinese translation of the root landing page). 3. Update documentation center links to point to these top-level readmes.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO modifications to src/ or bin/ logic. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics outside of this patch progression. NO implementation of runtime execution code. This is a documentation/presentation enhancement only.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/.
